subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that the rapture of the Call may seize him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیاخذه جذب الندآء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @call to action, @mystery of the great reversal, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual transformation
